title: UniteLabs Plate QC Dry Run
description: A deterministic dry-run lab workflow world for plate transfer quality control.

scenarios.name: plate_transfer_qc
scenarios.objective: Evaluate whether the plate QC workflow should continue.
scenarios.summary: Inspect dry-run deck state, perform a 50 uL source-to-assay transfer, read OD600, and submit a continue or hold protocol decision with evidence.
